name: solo-workspace
title: Solo
description: Solo / general-workflow workspace foundation: install-graph descriptor for the calendar, forms, docs, agent, tasks, and simple CRM/content/admin workspace.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/solo-workspace",
  "workspace": "solo",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.registry-foundation",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "button",
    "panel",
    "text-field",
    "data-list",
    "agent-panel",
    "docs-source-panel",
    "solo-app",
    "solo-today-page",
    "solo-docs-page",
    "solo-agenda-block",
    "solo-task-queue-block",
    "solo-agent-status-block",
    "solo-docs-sources-block",
    "solo-forms-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "solo-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "button",
      "panel",
      "text-field",
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "solo-app",
      "solo-today-page",
      "solo-docs-page",
      "solo-agenda-block",
      "solo-task-queue-block",
      "solo-agent-status-block",
      "solo-docs-sources-block",
      "solo-forms-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "calendar",
    "forms",
    "docs",
    "agent",
    "tasks",
    "crm",
    "content",
    "admin"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-09.workspace-shell",
    "title": "Solo / General Workflow",
    "summary": "A compact personal operations shell for calendar, tasks, docs, forms, CRM, content, admin, and display-only agent status.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.solo.shell",
      "layout": "workspace-with-rail",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Today",
          "route": "/solo/today"
        },
        {
          "label": "Tasks",
          "route": "/solo/tasks"
        },
        {
          "label": "Docs",
          "route": "/solo/docs"
        },
        {
          "label": "Admin",
          "route": "/solo/admin"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/solo/today",
        "page": "page.solo.today",
        "title": "Today command center",
        "blocks": [
          "block.solo.agenda",
          "block.solo.task-queue",
          "block.solo.agent-status"
        ]
      },
      {
        "path": "/solo/docs",
        "page": "page.solo.docs",
        "title": "Docs and sources",
        "blocks": [
          "block.solo.docs-sources",
          "block.solo.forms"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.solo.today",
        "title": "Today command center",
        "description": "Calendar, task queue, and non-executable agent status for a solo operator.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "agent-panel",
          "button",
          "panel"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "page.solo.docs",
        "title": "Docs and sources",
        "description": "Documents, citations, lightweight forms, and long reference notes.",
        "components": [
          "docs-source-panel",
          "text-field",
          "data-list",
          "panel"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.solo.agenda",
        "title": "Agenda",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.task-queue",
        "title": "Task queue",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "empty"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.agent-status",
        "title": "Agent status",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "error"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.docs-sources",
        "title": "Docs sources",
        "component": "docs-source-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.forms",
        "title": "Quick form",
        "component": "text-field",
        "stateExamples": [
          "invalid"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "componentParts": [
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "data-list",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "panel",
      "text-field"
    ],
    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "A long source title, task description, or calendar note wraps inside the shell without horizontal overflow.",
      "empty": "No tasks are due; the data-list announces an empty status instead of hiding the section.",
      "error": "Agent status is displayed as an error panel with no executable action wiring."
    },
    "provenance": {
      "source": "registry/workspaces/solo/workspace-shell.json",
      "copiedSource": false
    }
  },
  "implementation": {
    "status": "mounted-react-workspace-implementation",
    "runtimeReactApp": true,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "source": "packages/ui/src/workspaces.mjs",
    "app": "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/solo-app.implementation.json",
    "pages": [
      "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/pages/solo-today-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/pages/solo-docs-page.page.implementation.json"
    ],
    "blocks": [
      "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-agenda-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-task-queue-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-agent-status-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-docs-sources-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/workspaces/solo/blocks/solo-forms-block.block.implementation.json"
    ]
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Workspace shell installs generated route/page/block/component descriptors from authored source; full React app implementation remains pending.
